qir_pattern.name: GENUINE_UNCERTAINTY
qir_pattern.interpretation: No edge — signals are conflicting with no clear majority direction.

current_events_digest: **Stagflationary pressures intensify in Neutral-Risk-Off regime (-0.14 score), as Qatar's helium production collapse prompts AirGas force majeure—critical for TSMC's chip lithography amid Strait of Hormuz LNG risks—compounding oil's surge past $115/bbl on Kuwaiti tanker drone strike, validating high-energy inflation narrative despite China's Caixin PMI rebound to yearly highs.** Japan's long-end JGB yields spike (10Y 2.37%, 30Y 3.69%, 40Y ~3.9%) with USDJPY >160 fuels BOJ intervention fears and carry unwind, while Oracle CDS hits GFC peaks signals tech distress. **Actionable risks: Semicon supply shock (short TSMC proxies), oil-gold decoupling per historical crises; opportunities: Defense names on Trump war rhetoric, Chinese industrials on PMI strength.**

open_positions.thesis: Ultimate risks off trade for the Yen carry trade.
Hedge against US national debt 39 trillion and inflation.
Ultimate hedge against yen carry trade.
